title: BotQ Ramping F.03 Production
summary:
Today we’re giving an update on ramping F.03 production at BotQ

In the last 120 days, Figure scaled manufacturing 24x - from 1 robot/day to 1 robot/hour

We will manufacture 55 humanoid robots this week

title: How Does Stretch See? | Ask A Roboticist | Boston Dynamics
summary: Ethan Lauer, a software engineer, answers your questions about robot perception, world modeling, and what spooks our Stretch robot.
